case_title: PACHARIN PISANSATHERAWONGE VS. KANE DANIEL MINKUS et al

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT MINKUS, KANE DANIEL MINKUS, KANE
REQ. FOR JUDICIAL NTC IN OPPOS. TO DEFT'S MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PISANSATHERAWONGE, PACHARIN
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS KANE MINKUS AND KANE MINKUS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT ADMITTED IN HIS DECLARATION THAT HE WAS PERSONALLY SERVED WHILE PRESENT IN CALIFORNIA. (MINKUS DECL. 3:6-9.) NOTHING MORE IS REQUIRED FOR THIS COURT TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. (PENNOYER V. NEFF (1877) 95 U.S. 714, 722.) THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED BY EMAIL PRIOR TO THE HEARING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.(302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS KANE MINKUS and KANE MINKUS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is denied. Defendant admitted in his declaration that he was personally served while present in California. (Minkus Decl. 3:6-9.) Nothing more is required for this Court to exercise jurisdiction over Defendant. (Pennoyer v. Neff (1877) 95 U.S. 714, 722.) The Court signed the order that was submitted by email prior to the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
